title: trifolium wormskioldii var. siskiyouense
intro: Trifolium wormskioldii var. siskiyouense, also known as Siskiyou clover, is a variety of perennial herb that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Siskiyou clover is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which may help to soothe digestive issues and protect against oxidative stress. The plant's health benefits include supporting immune function, reducing inflammation, and potentially alleviating symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Siskiyou clover can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
